source: compiled from elec/src/*.ato (atopile) — same stack as resonant-computer Tile-0
analog_refs_note: DMM/Kelvin reed-relay bank + reference block + window comparators form the analog island; guard rings around DMM_HI/DMM_LO; moat between relay-coil/digital region and lane region per relay-probe-matrix-rev-a.md section 9
power_tree_refs_note: 24V entry (J2) -> TPS54331 -> coil rail w/ INA219 shunt; TPS62086 3V3_DIG; TPS7A4901 3V3_ANA

center: 8x LaneSelector relay trees, lane buses run east

board_size_note: 160x100 target was 76% courtyard utilization - grew to 200x146 (real library footprints, DRC floorplan-clean)
